message:
feat(persist,server): add CRC64 integrity checks and blocking sorted-set operations

Persistence (fr-persist):
- Implement CRC64 checksum validation using Redis polynomial for RDB
  file integrity verification
- Reject RDB files with mismatched checksums or missing EOF trailer
- Refactor into reusable persist_snapshot_to_disk() method

Server (fr-server):
- Fix check_blocked_clients() to properly re-arm poll for WRITABLE
  after sending responses to unblocked clients

Runtime (fr-runtime):
- Add BZPOPMAX and BZPOPMIN blocking commands for sorted set pop
  operations matching Redis semantics

Store (fr-store):
- Fix ZINTERSTORE/ZUNIONSTORE to use mutable references and call
  touch(now_ms) for proper key freshness tracking
- Comprehensive tests for RDB checksum validation and BGSAVE behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
